stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 15 and Doc 10066, an internationally distributed NOTAM must be issued in…

options.a: English and distributed via the Aeronautical Fixed Service (AFS).
options.b: A national language only, distributed via the Automatic Fully-Integrated Service (AFS).
options.c: English only, distributed via the Automatic Fully-Integrated Service (AFS).
options.d: A national language only, distributed via the Aeronautical Fixed Service (AFS).
